name: Player Counter
description: Shows the live number of connected players (and up to 5 names) on each server's overview, with automatic detection of the full GameDig catalogue (350+ games — Minecraft, Valheim, Sons of the Forest, ARK, Palworld, Rust, Enshrouded, V Rising…) via a self-hosted GameDig sidecar. When a game needs a dedicated query/RCON port it is allocated and configured automatically — no admin or player action. Includes an egg whitelist and a bilingual Docker setup guide.
author: Peregrine
